title: 降价幅度高达99%，小米大机型API永久减少
description: 此次，小米放弃了区分上下文窗口长度的传统定价方式，优化了Token Plan计费系统。
titleZh: 降价幅度高达99%，小米大机型API永久减少
titleEn: Up to 99% Price Cut, Xiaomi's Large Model API Permanently Reduced
descriptionZh: 此次，小米放弃了区分上下文窗口长度的传统定价方式，优化了Token Plan计费系统。
descriptionEn: This time, Xiaomi has abandoned the traditional pricing method that distinguishes context window lengths and optimized the Token Plan billing system.

title: 商界领袖对人工智能最大的误解：“尝试”而不是“颠覆”
description: Currently, most enterprises are still in the stage of "watching the excitement" or "trying it out" with AI, being swept along by the舆论 storm of self-media, lacking independent and correct judgment.
titleZh: 商界领袖对人工智能最大的误解：“尝试”而不是“颠覆”
titleEn: The Biggest Misconception Business Leaders Have About AI: "Trying It Out" Instead of "Disruption"
descriptionZh: Currently, most enterprises are still in the stage of "watching the excitement" or "trying it out" with AI, being swept along by the舆论 storm of self-media, lacking independent and correct judgment.
descriptionEn: Currently, most enterprises are still in the stage of "watching the excitement" or "trying it out" with AI, being swept along by the public opinion storm of self-media, lacking independence and correct judgment.
